title: Ghostfolio
description: Open-source wealth management software to track stocks, ETFs, crypto and other assets across accounts in one privacy-focused dashboard.
installation: NestJS/Angular app served on port 3333. Companion services deployed as add-ons: PostgreSQL (primary DB) and a Valkey (Redis-protocol) instance used for caching and the queue. Database migrations run automatically on boot. Rotate ACCESS_TOKEN_SALT and JWT_SECRET_KEY to unique random values (openssl rand -hex 32 each) and rotate the postgres password before exposing publicly. The Valkey add-on runs without a password, so REDIS_PASSWORD is left empty. After first launch, create your account from the start page; the FIRST registered user (or one whose security token you promote) can be granted admin by setting their role to ADMIN in the Postgres _user table. Stock/crypto market data is fetched from external providers (Yahoo Finance by default); configure additional DATA_SOURCE provider API keys via env if you need them.
